title: 10 best herbal creams for mucus in throat
description: Sambucus nigra, also known as elder, creams helps with mucus in throat because of its natural decongestant and anti-inflammatory properties. The cream contains flavonoids, which have been shown to reduce swelling and ease congestion in the nasal passages and throat. Additionally, the antiviral properties of Sambucus nigra help to combat the underlying viral infections that cause excess mucus production. By soothing and protecting the mucous membranes, these creams provide quick relief ...
